implementation_inventory.logic_note: Substantive kernel logic with per-layer/fallback behavior and trial execution.
Substantive pruning math and trial generation; synthetic metrics.
Substantive recomputation/storage tradeoff logic; synthetic metrics.
Substantive fusion/tiling simulation logic; synthetic metrics.
Executable proxy simulator with estimated conversion overhead.
Executable representation proxy harness; simulation-only metrics.
Event-driven behavior approximated in executable simulator.
Executable moonshot adapters with synthetic/estimated metrics.

acceptance_audit.hypothesis: BF16 baseline freeze establishes immutable reference with reproducible measurement envelope.
Adaptive per-layer INT4 quantization with BF16 fallback improves ECD by at least 15% on transformer inference without violating the 99% quality floor.
INT8 static quantization sweep improves ECD while keeping quality within 1% of baseline.
Dynamic token pruning improves energy efficiency >=20% with bounded quality loss.
acceptance_audit.credibility_note: Higher practical value due to near-term path and reusable kernel scaffolding; credibility constrained by synthetic metrics and missing independent holdout scoring.

acceptance_audit.hypothesis: INT4 static quantization sweep can improve ECD with acceptable quality floor enforcement.
acceptance_audit.credibility_note: Higher practical value due to near-term path and reusable kernel scaffolding; credibility constrained by synthetic metrics and missing independent holdout scoring.

acceptance_audit.hypothesis: Selective recomputation reduces memory traffic while preserving output quality.
Kernel fusion reduces p95 latency by >=10% with semantic equivalence.
acceptance_audit.credibility_note: Higher practical value due to near-term path and reusable kernel scaffolding; credibility constrained by synthetic metrics and missing independent holdout scoring.

acceptance_audit.hypothesis: Per-layer mixed precision search improves ECD over uniform precision policies.
Activation quantization sweep improves ECD while meeting quality floor.
Token pruning threshold sweep reduces energy per task by at least 20% with bounded quality loss.
acceptance_audit.credibility_note: Higher practical value due to near-term path and reusable kernel scaffolding; credibility constrained by synthetic metrics and missing independent holdout scoring.

acceptance_audit.hypothesis: Sparse activation routing improves ECD via conditional compute paths.
Iterative kernel fusion loop reduces p95 latency by at least 10%.
acceptance_audit.credibility_note: Higher practical value due to near-term path and reusable kernel scaffolding; credibility constrained by synthetic metrics and missing independent holdout scoring.

acceptance_audit.hypothesis: Memory layout and cache policy sweep reduces bytes moved per task.
Retrieval versus recompute policy improves energy without quality loss.
RNS arithmetic kernel emulator yields net ECD gains after conversion overhead.
RNS modulus set search improves arithmetic efficiency and stability.
LNS multiply-heavy kernels improve energy proxy relative to binary baseline.
Posit representation improves quality-energy tradeoff on selected workloads.
Ternary representation reduces active compute with acceptable quality loss.
Boundary placement search in heterogeneous arithmetic pipelines improves net ECD.
Asynchronous execution emulation lowers joules per event on sparse temporal workloads.
FPGA proxy mapping demonstrates viable performance-resource tradeoffs for alternative arithmetic.
Analog MAC noise sweep indicates plausible system-level ECD advantage under bounded drift.
Analog calibration overhead remains below projected efficiency gains.
Photonic linear algebra model retains throughput-energy gains after system integration assumptions.
Optical-digital boundary cost can be amortized in hybrid matrix workloads.
In-memory compute model reduces data-movement energy enough to raise ECD.
Endurance and drift sensitivity remains within tolerable bounds under projected workloads.
Neuromorphic temporal coding improves joules per event in sparse temporal tasks.

stubbed_implementations.finding: Mid-term and moonshot families rely on proxy simulators rather than hardware-backed implementations.

mocked_metrics.finding: Near-term kernels inject random noise and synthetic formulas; no real profiler ingestion in execution path.

dead_code_or_unused_paths.finding: StatsEvaluator.generate_verdict exists but full pipeline uses StatisticsAgent.evaluate directly.

holdout_leakage_or_missing_holdout_eval.finding: Benchmark set declares holdout, but ExperimentRunner executes trials only on benchmark_set[0].

acceptance_without_repeated_trials.finding: No acceptance without repeated trials detected in stored records (trials configured as 10).

config_only_counted_as_implemented.finding: Some experiment families are config-only wrappers over generic simulators, not bespoke implementations per experiment.

metrics_collected_but_ignored_in_verdict.finding: Verdict pipeline primarily uses ecd_improvement, significance, CI, quality_ok; several collected metrics do not affect decision directly.

top5_credible_wins.hypothesis: INT4 static quantization sweep can improve ECD with acceptable quality floor enforcement.
top5_credible_wins.credibility_note: Higher practical value due to near-term path and reusable kernel scaffolding; credibility constrained by synthetic metrics and missing independent holdout scoring.

gaps_and_next_work: Replace synthetic metric generation with real benchmark harness integration (GPU telemetry, power, latency traces).
Execute dev/validation/holdout as independent scored passes and gate acceptance on explicit holdout metrics.
Unify verdict logic so all configured constraints (latency/energy/complexity/transfer) are mandatory in code.
Add per-family bespoke implementations for mid-term and moonshot experiments instead of shared generic simulator outputs.
Add reproducibility hardening: pinned environments, artifact hashing for results/trials, deterministic replay checks.
